# ZadarIQ

> Live city guide for Zadar, Croatia — what's open right now (pharmacies, dentists, shops), public transport, parking, EV chargers, events, and city alerts. Multilingual (HR/EN/DE/IT).

## Pages

- [Početna / Home](/): Live "now in Zadar" dashboard with weather, alerts, situational recommendations.
- [Pretraživanje / Search](/search): Search businesses and places across Zadar.
- [Hitno / Emergency](/emergency): Emergency numbers and on-call pharmacies/dentists.
- [Prijevoz / Transport](/transport): Bus and ferry schedules for Zadar region.
- [Parking](/parking): Public parking zones, prices, and availability.
- [Kino / Cinema](/cinema): Movie schedules in Zadar (CineStar, Kino Zona).
- [Događanja / Events](/events): Concerts, festivals, exhibitions in Zadar, Zrće, and Tisno.
- [Sunday Radar](/sunday-radar): Which shops are open this Sunday in Zadar.
- [EV punionice / EV Chargers](/ev-chargers): Electric vehicle charging stations.
- [Znamenitosti / Sights](/znamenitosti): Tourist attractions in Zadar.
- [Javne službe / Public services](/public-services): Government and city services directory.
- [Komunalna poduzeća / Utility companies](/utility-companies): Water, electricity, waste, and utility contacts.
- [Digitalni Zadar](/digital-zadar): Digital city services portal.
- [Za tvrtke / For business](/for-business): Information for business owners.
- [Pravne informacije](/pravne-informacije): Legal disclaimers and data sources.
- [Izvori podataka / Data sources](/data-sources): Public data sources used.

## Optional

- [Uvjeti / Terms](/terms): Terms of use.
- [Privatnost / Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
